title: The Blue Pearl
writer: Anne Crawford Flexner, Emma Bell Clifton
actors: Edith Hallor, Lumsden Hare, Earl Schenck
plot: When thief Frederick Thurston returns from abroad with a stolen blue pearl, he sells the jewel to Holland Webb, a gigolo living off the funds of his wealthy wife Laura. Holland then presents the pearl to his mistress Sybil Trent, ...
